header.tabs_hint: Tab placement: click on a contour in 2D to add a tab; click an existing tab to remove. Esc to leave.
header.lang.title: Language
generate.title: Generate:
setup.title: Setup
tools.label: Tool
tools.save_hint: Save the current tool config under this name
layers.title: Layers
stock.title: Stock
op.help.cut_direction.conventional: Cutter rotation OPPOSES feed at contact. Safer on machines with backlash; chip starts thin.
op.help.cut_direction.climb: Cutter rotation matches feed at contact. Better surface finish; needs a stiff machine.
op.help.plunge.direct: Straight Z plunge into material. Safe for center-cutting end mills on shallow steps; risky on harder materials.
op.help.plunge.ramp: Ramped descent: cutter walks forward along the path while Z descends, taking a chip in both directions. Required for non-center-cutting bits.
op.help.plunge.helix: Helical entry: cutter spirals down on a small circle inside the closed pocket boundary, then walks to the path start. Standard for non-center-cutting endmills and harder materials. Falls back to ramp on open paths or when the helix circle does not fit.
op.help.tab_type.rectangle: Straight Z lift over each tab: cutter pops up to tab height, runs across, drops back down. Simple and fast.
op.help.tab_type.ramp: Sloped entry/exit: cutter ramps UP at the configured angle, holds tab height for the flat top, then ramps DOWN. Smoother machine motion and cleaner tab transitions.
op.help.combine.auto: Containment-aware: nested closed objects become holes (outer + inner = annulus). Default.
op.help.combine.union: Boolean union of all selected closed contours.
op.help.combine.difference: First selected minus the union of the rest.
op.help.combine.intersection: Boolean intersection of all selected closed contours.
op.help.combine.xor: Symmetric difference (xor) of all selected closed contours.
op.help.combine.none: No combination — one boundary per selected object, no holes.
